keyFactors: Senegal has a slightly higher ELO rating than Norway, which indicates a stronger team on paper.
Senegal's recent form and clean sheet rate are better than Norway's, demonstrating their recent defensive solidity.
Both teams have identical preparation time since their last match, so fatigue is not a factor.
There is no historical head-to-head data, which introduces uncertainty but doesn't specifically bias either team.
risks: Norway has a high goals-for average, indicating they can be very potent on the attack if given the chance.
The match is being played in a neutral venue, which mitigates any possible home advantage.

prediction.rationale: Beide Modelle sind sich weitgehend einig. Ausschlaggebend: Senegal mit höherem Elo (1828 vs. 1774) und stärkerer gewichteter Form (2.441 vs. 2.019); Senegals defensive Stabilität deutlich besser: Clean-Sheet-Rate 64,7% und nur 0,61 Gegentore im Schnitt; Norwegens starke Offensive (2,78 Tore/Spiel) trifft auf eine kompakte senegalesische Abwehr.
